title: Levviata's Death Events
description: A mix of death events and a bunch of misc junk.
body:
# Levviata's Death Events
Basically a mod that only meaningfully works with my own mod pack; this mod resets day, srp parasites' phase points and to 0 while also adding a new compat with Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod and my own fork of Simple Difficulty which of modifies temperature dmg (oh and this mod also respawns you on a 1000x1000 random location on death, have fun!)
